title: Taking stock of March 2025 ransomware incident

extortion.description: Our team was able to breach the IT defenses of a huge number of companies. Among them are:| csur.net | alghisi.net | minoas.gr | grandimolini.it | transportescarvalho.com.br | cesaroni.com | Everyone who agreed to cooperate with us did not appear on this list. The data of the others have been made publicly available or disclosed here.We always act honestly and try not to disclose the fact of data leakage until the very last moment. Therefore, it is in your best interest not to be on this list and contact us immediately.
